locations.kind: legacy MCP inline values or environment-name references
locations.policy: preserve existing values; never display, diff, log, back up by value, or copy to Telegram
trusted canonical project only; reject symlink escape; preserve protected assignments

locations.kind: API keys, bearer tokens, bot-token references
locations.policy: names may be persisted; values stay process-local and redacted
read/write only through the existing Keychain wrapper

locations.location: macOS Keychain or owner-only external file
locations.policy: never store token material in project/global JSON
